headline: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) Is Down 12.7% After Swing To Q1 Profitability On Lower Revenue
summary: In the first quarter ended March 31, 2026, Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. reported sales of US$653.01 million and revenue of US$671.02 million, with net income of US$361.65 million and basic and diluted EPS from continuing operations of US$2.10, reversing a loss a year earlier. This shift from a net loss to strong profitability, despite lower sales and revenue, points to meaningful operational or cost-efficiency gains that could influence how investors assess the resilience of...
